XR select exit path: Requires TeleportAnchorWithFade attached and TeleportationAnchor.teleportTrigger == OnSelectExited. Collider/EventTrigger required for XR interaction; FadeCanvas must exist. XR activate path: Requires TeleportAnchorWithFade attached and TeleportationAnchor.teleportTrigger == OnActivated. Collider/EventTrigger required; FadeCanvas must exist. Expected behavior: FadeSequence wraps base.OnActivated(args) with QuickFadeIn/Out. No serialized UnityEvents (m_Calls) present and no MonoBehaviour instance id for TeleportAnchorWithFade provided.

XR deactivate path: Requires TeleportAnchorWithFade attached and TeleportationAnchor.teleportTrigger == OnDeactivated. Collider/EventTrigger required; FadeCanvas must exist.
